name: Saus Kacang
recipeIngredient: Pan drippings                   3 1/2 tbsp Peanut butter, crunchy
recipeInstructions:
Calories per serving: 67 Fat grams per serving: 4 Approx. Cook Time:
0:15 Grind together pepper, onion, garlic, and shrimp paste. Fry them together in a little vegetable oil until the onion is golden. Add the pan drippings. Add the peanut butter, salt, and tamarind water. Stir and cook, adding coconut milk, until the sauce is the consistency of thick gravy.
